mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_rag_chunk WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector LIMIT #{topK}

SELECT chunk_id, document_id, parent_chunk_id, content, chunk_index, metadata, 1 - (embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector) AS similarity FROM t_rag_chunk WHERE deleted = 0 AND 1 - (embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector) >= #{threshold} ORDER BY embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector LIMIT #{topK}
SELECT chunk_id, document_id, content, chunk_index, metadata FROM t_rag_chunk WHERE chunk_id = #{chunkId} AND deleted = 0
